rows.finding_summary: Active set table listed controlled index as r13 instead of r14.
rows.ruling: Controlled index shall truthfully identify its own active revision.

rows.finding_summary: Consistency assessment referenced UDQ-GOV-LOG-001 r6 as active-set source.
rows.ruling: Reports shall reference the current active controlled set.

rows.source_documents: UDQ-GOV-GLO-001 r0; UDQ-PROF-SPEC-001 r0; UDQ-ARCH-NAR-001 r3; UDQ-UI-MOD-001 r1
rows.finding_summary: Owning semantics were not explicit enough to prevent future drift.
rows.ruling: Restore is not machine-state reassertion; workspace state and machine state remain distinct.
rows.resolution_vehicle: UDQ-GOV-GLO-001 r1; UDQ-GOV-STD-002 r0; UDQ-EXM-SPEC-001 r0

rows.source_documents: UDQ-GOV-GLO-001 r0; UDQ-OUT-SPEC-001 r1; UDQ-UI-NAR-001 r1; UDQ-REM-SPEC-001 r1
rows.finding_summary: The glossary did not own these distinctions strongly enough.
rows.ruling: Requested, applied, and observed state are separate facts with glossary ownership.

rows.source_documents: UDQ-UI-SPEC-004 r0; UDQ-HIS-SPEC-001 r1; UDQ-UI-MOD-001 r1; UDQ-UI-NAR-001 r1
rows.finding_summary: Edges among these terms were intuitively consistent but not centrally codified.
rows.ruling: Live trace is live explainability; historical review is evidence exploration; review mode is the broader UI posture.
